case_title: TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS JOHNSTONE,ROBERTS L(PRES)C/O ENVIRONMENTALTEXTILES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,502.32 FILED BY TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTONE,ROBERTS L(PRES)C/O ENVIRONMENTALTEXTILES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO ROBERTS JOHNSTONE RETURNED SIGNED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-07-1993, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAY-21-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSTONE,ROBERTS L(PRES)C/O ENVIRONMENTALTEXTILES $1,502.32 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,522.32, PLFT IS TO CREDIT DEF $750 OR WHATEVER IT CAN GET TO FR SALE OF DEF'S PROPERTY NOW IN PLAINTIFF'S STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
